---
title: "The Ven. Robert Isaac Wilberforce"
---

## The Ven. Robert Isaac Wilberforce

**Dates:** (1802-1857)

### Description

Archdeacon of the East Riding

### Biography

He married, first, Agnes Wrangham (d. 1834) and, secondly (1837), Jane Legard (d.1853); he was  appointed Archdeacon of the East Riding in 1841;  and received into the Roman Catholic church 31 October 1853.

### Letters

- Letter from Febry 23d 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
